creator: gerard_seibert@outlook.com
text:
(In reply to Rpapousek from comment #147)
I don't have a machine set up to try this on presently. However, I question why it would work though. I don't have a great knowledge of how USB works exactly on FreeBSD. Can anyone with more knowledge comment?

Rpapousek, are you inferring that the error 'never' shows up again or just doesn't appear until a new boot is started?
